  • 🎪✨ WELCOME TO THE FUN HOUSE – WEEKEND BLOCK PARTY! ✨🎪 – Feb 27

    🎪✨ WELCOME TO THE FUN HOUSE – WEEKEND BLOCK PARTY! ✨🎪

    We’re transforming Argyle Street & Grafton Street into a full-blown nightlife carnival — and you’re invited.

    🎟 5 Venues

    🎭 4 Themes

    🏢 3 Floors

    🔥 1 Cover gets you everywhere

    🍹 $2.50 drinks all weekend

    From high-energy dance floors at Rox Live, to the party vibes at The Dome, the country twist of Neon Armadillo, and the urban edge of Roxbury — this isn’t just a night out… it’s a choose-your-own-adventure.

    Bounce between venues. Find your theme. Switch up your vibe.

    Every corner has something happening.

    📅 Friday, Feb 27

    📅 Saturday, Feb 28

    This is your sign to round up the group chat and make it a weekend.

    🎠 Halifax nightlife just got a little wild.

    February 20, 2026

    February 20, 2026

  • LIGHTHOUSE-10 YEAR ANNIVERSARY EVENT W/ FLAVA D – Feb 27

    It’s been a long time coming. Everything we have worked for has led us here. Lighthouses 10 year anniversary is February 27th and for the past decade there’s been one artist who’s stood above all and influenced our sound and our energy. Her name is FLAVA D!

    With over a decade of experience in the game, Flava D has become known as one the most prolific and versatile artists on the bass music circuit. The Bournemouth born producer has established an internationally successful career playing and releasing all flexes of UK garage, grime and bassline. Now, Flava D is adding drum & bass to her repertoire by officially joining Songs In The Key Of Knife.

    A string of successful releases like ‘In The Dance’, ‘Soul Shake’ with My Nu Leng, ‘Spicy Noodles’, and the TQD album, ‘UKG’ alongside Royal-T & DJ Q, received global recognition from critics, fellow tastemakers and most importantly the dancefloor.

    Flava D’s technical talents and superior selection style have been forever etched in dance music history as she has stamped her sound on projects reserved for God tier DJs. Signing her name amongst the limited alumni of world-famous nightclub, Fabric by mixing the 88th edition of their FABRICLIVE series. In addition to her worldwide bookings, Flava D has curated diverse line ups for her own headline shows with a 13-week residency at London’s XOYO whilst her taste-making was broadcast on a national scale with a 6-month residency at BBC Radio 1.

    Flava D’s first venture into drum & bass came in the form of her track ‘Return To Me’ which featured on Hospital Records’ annual compilation ‘Sick Music 2019’ and was selected as Annie Mac’s Hottest Record In The World. With the success of her label debut, the imprint welcomed her back to release ‘Human Trumpet’ and she became a regular name at their events and festivals worldwide – with mainstage sets at Hospitality In the Park, Hospitality On the Beach as well as Let It Roll

    With DJ sets from:GROOVY TUESDAYTROY POWER B2B KDZCHILLIER

    Tickets on sale now:TIER 1 $19.00TIER 2 $25.00TIER 3 $30.00DOOR $37.00(No refunds)

    Featuring a massive sound wall by blackboxsoundcru& and immersive environment by Wasko AV

    View full event details at 2037 Gottingen

    February 11, 2026

  • The OBGMs at EVERYSEEKER – Jun 13

    The OBGMs are a Black-fronted punk band from Toronto, Canada, and one of the most electrifying live acts in modern rock. Known for their explosive performances and fearless energy, they’ve become a defining force in the new wave of punk — loud, anthemic, and unapologetically themselves.

    Their album Sorry, It’s Over, a brutally honest reflection on therapy, heartbreak, and self-growth, earned The OBGMs their second Polaris Music Prize Short List nomination, cementing their place among Canada’s most vital voices. The record turns personal struggle into stadium-sized catharsis — every scream, riff, and lyric a step toward closure.

    Fronted by Densil “Denz” McFarlane, alongside Colanthony “Cola” Humphrey, Simon Outhit, and Joseph Brosnan, the band channels chaos into clarity, standing shoulder to shoulder with artists like Turnstile, IDLES, and PUP while carving out a sound that’s distinctly their own.

    For The OBGMs, punk isn’t nostalgia. It’s rebirth.

    View full event details at 2037 Gottingen

    February 11, 2026

  • Lunar New Year Disco ’26 Halifax: Mandarin & Cantonese Disco Party – Year of the Horse – Feb 13

    Lunar New Year Disco Party returns for its 4th annual edition.

    After three consecutive sold-out shows in Toronto and Halifax, Halifax’s own selector Swee comes back with his deepest crates, digging into Cantonese and Mandarin disco, rare dance cuts, and more with great energy built for the floor.

    Expect fearless rhythms, heavy grooves, and nonstop movement, music rooted in Chinese culture but made for everyone who loves to dance.

    Strictly all canto/mando music but all are welcome. Come dance the year of horse in.

    View full event details at 2037 Gottingen

    February 11, 2026

  • 🤠🔥 FULL TILT FRIDAYS 🔥🤠 – Feb 13

    🤠🔥 FULL TILT FRIDAYS at Neon Armadillo 🔥🤠

    If you’re ready to dance, drink, and let loose — this is your night.

    We’re going full tilt every Friday with high-energy country hits, a packed dance floor, and unbeatable drink prices.

    🕙 10PM start

    🍹 $2.50 drinks

    📍 Neon Armadillo — 1741 Grafton St

    From two-steppin’ to boot-stompin’, this is where Halifax comes to move. Whether you’re a regular or rolling in for the first time, expect big vibes, cold drinks, and the kind of Friday night that turns into a story.

    Halifax’s #1 country dance bar — no excuses, just dance 🤠💃🕺

    February 11, 2026

  • DARK ROOM – Feb 21

    Dark Room returns to the Seahorse.

    A post-punk dance party where darkwave, EBM, industrial, and gothy delights meet synthpop, dark disco, and more.

    This evening is a blend of cult classics and deep cuts from the 1980s to the present.

    The room has been filling up quickly, so advance tickets are recommended.

     

    $10 Early Bird / $15 Advance / $20 Door

     The Seahorse Tavern

     Saturday, February 21st

     10 PM to 2 AM

     

     Ticket Link In Bio

    linktr.ee/darkroomhfx

     

     Follow @darkroomhfx

     Poster designs: @terminalshadowban

    February 9, 2026
